## Meeting Purpose

[Review Firework's blog performance and discuss strategies for improvement with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Firework's blog is experiencing indexing issues (only 40% indexed) and low traffic (40 visitors), despite GrowthX's consistent content delivery](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [There's a gap in GrowthX's reporting process, particularly in analyzing engagement metrics from Google Analytics](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Both parties agree to focus on improving existing content and incorporating engagement data into the feedback loop for better content optimization](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)

## Topics

### Current Performance and Challenges

  - [100+ articles written, only 40% indexed](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Approximately 40 visitors to the blog](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Impressions and clicks are increasing, but not at the desired rate](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Unique indexing issues with Firework compared to other GrowthX clients](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### Positive Aspects of GrowthX's Service

  - [Consistent on-time delivery of content (10 articles, 5 revisions weekly)](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Experienced team members (Jimmy, Pratik) providing valuable SEO insights](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Educating Firework on the importance of Google Search Console metrics](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)

### Areas for Improvement

  - [Need for deeper analysis of engagement metrics (bounce rate, session time)](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Lack of access to Google Analytics data by GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [Potential for implementing AI-driven content optimization techniques](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

### Case Study: Deep Brand Glossary

  - [Demonstrated slow initial growth followed by significant improvement](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [First click occurred \~2 months after first publication](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Gradual increase in impressions and clicks over time](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

### Content Optimization Strategies

  - [Rewriting "zombie" blog posts with AI showed 15x growth in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [AI-adjusted content (45-80% changes) performed better than purely human-written content](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Hypothesis: Google may have stricter restrictions on newly AI-written content vs. optimized existing content](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)

### Technical SEO Considerations

  - [Google's indexing process and limitations in accessing site engagement data](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Importance of technical factors (mobile responsiveness, site speed, authorship) for indexing](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1249.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to incorporate engagement data into their reporting and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=778.0)
  - [Research tools to accelerate content indexing](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [Firework to share insights on any content performing well outside of GrowthX's engagement](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1461.0)
  - [Continue investigating website migration and other technical factors affecting performance](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine their content creation workflow, potentially incorporating AI-driven uniqueness and detection rate scoring](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Both parties to reassess the engagement if performance doesn't improve, considering options to refocus or potentially conclude the partnership](https://fathom.video/share/uGy2A44y274zU61jTDqgigQhAcxhxiem?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
